info.name: Preelly / Marketplace API
info.description:
Generated from `server/swagger/allPaths.js` and route handlers. Default **baseUrl** is `http://localhost:5002` (see server `PORT`).

Set **token** after `POST /api/auth/verify-otp` (email or WhatsApp), `POST /api/auth/verify-email-otp`, or signup verification.

Path variables like `{{id}}`, `{{productId}}` are placeholders — replace with real MongoDB ObjectIds.

request.description: Register; sends email OTP (+ WhatsApp OTP when mobile OTP enabled)
Send signup mobile verification OTP via WhatsApp
Verify email with OTP; returns JWT
Verify signup mobile OTP (WhatsApp); returns JWT when fully verified
Send login/signup OTP via email or WhatsApp (login only for WhatsApp)
Send login OTP via WhatsApp (StreakMsg template). Requires existing user account.
Verify OTP and sign in (email or WhatsApp channel)
Verify WhatsApp login OTP and receive JWT.

Update profile (multipart: profilePic)

Use **body → form-data**: profilePic (file), name, city, lat, lng, skip, gender, dob, addressLine1, etc.

formdata.value: Add real file + fields per description above.

request.description: Create or open support chat (same URL as product chat).
